Your goal is to successfully build and run the Unicorn Princess Party Drinking Game locally.

## Checklist
- [ ] Required dependencies (.NET 10 SDK) installed and verified
- [ ] Build task functional
- [ ] Dev server running (dotnet run) on port 5166
